title: Microsoft is testing free, ad-supported cloud gaming for Xbox Insiders
summary: ﻿The free streaming option is still in testing, and limited to one-hour sessions for ‘select’ games. ﻿The free streaming option is still in testing, and limited to one-hour sessions for ‘select’ games.
